transcript: Customer: Hi, this is James Miller. I'm calling because my shower valve keeps running. Dispatcher: Hi James, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Kohler, maybe 10 years old. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 9 Lakeview Drive. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out Wednesday afternoon. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.equipment: Kohler shower valve, maybe 10 years old
